name: Aspen Group
analysis: APZ has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 18% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$5.2500, stop A$4.4550, target A$5.8300 (0.73:1) — then trail it.
